message:
test(frankenterm-core): add cursor movement handlers to differential extras reference harness

Add CursorNextLine, CursorPrevLine, CursorColumn, and CursorRow action
handlers to CoreTerminalHarness in the extras reference test, matching
the handlers already present in the primary differential terminal test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
